problem: Mark borrows $10$ dollars from Emily with a simple interest rate of $15\%$ everyday. What is the least integer number of days after which Mark will have to pay her back at least twice as much as he borrowed?

classified_questions.question: Can you describe the concept of simple interest in this scenario and how it relates to borrowing money?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What formula can we use to calculate the amount of interest Mark will have to pay after a certain number of days?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can we express the total amount Mark will have to pay back after a given number of days, taking both the borrowed amount and the interest into account?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What is the least integer number of days that Mark will have to wait in order to pay Emily back at least twice as much as he borrowed?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How do we determine if the amount Mark has to pay after a certain number of days is at least twice as much as the amount he borrowed?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of any other scenarios or situations where the concept of simple interest would be applicable?
classified_questions.label: e
